tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.version_description: It's just capo on 3 and Em C B7 the whole way through.

content:
Chords
[ch]A#[/ch]:  113331
[tab][ch]D#[/ch]:  365343
B:   224442 or B7:224342 (not 100% of that chord in the song but I think the first of em' is right)[/tab]
[tab][ch]A#m[/ch]: 113321
(If the chords seems hard you can play on the three or four lowest strings)[/tab]

Intro: A# D# some times

[tab][ch]A#[/ch]
I'm the kind of brotha[/tab]
[tab][ch]D#[/ch]                                        [ch]A#[/ch]
Who been doin' it my way gettin my way for years, in my career[/tab]

And every lover[/tab]
[tab][ch]D#[/ch]                                            [ch]A#[/ch]
in and out my life Ive hit, love and left the tears, Without a care[/tab]

[tab][ch]A#[/ch]      [ch]B[/ch]                                     [ch]A#[/ch]
Until I met this girl who turned the tables around[/tab]
She caught me by surprise
[tab]  [ch]B[/ch]                                     [ch]A#[/ch]
I never thought I'd be the one breaking down[/tab]
I cant figure it out why

mah mama told me

And I can't figure it out but

I don't know what it is, but it seems shes got me twisted
